summary: DPA page successfully renders with proper diner aesthetic, all required content sections, and mobile-responsive layout. Minor palette deviation in card background but core functionality and branding intact.

violations.description: Card background appears to use white instead of the specified cream surface color #fff8ea for legal content cards

Confirm all section headings and content match the canonical DPA legal contract
Test back navigation link functionality to root route
